Footer.terms: Terms of Business and Privacy Policy

LogosSection.trust: Drivers from more than 250 companies trust us with their Koda 95 training

Faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
Faq.intro: Read the most common questions about Koda 95. If you have further questions, get in touch — we're happy to help.

About.heading: Why choose us for your Koda 95 training?
About.body: Tahografi Cuderman is an authorised driver training centre for Koda 95. We combine expert knowledge, hands-on experience, and a real understanding of the driving profession, so drivers always leave with something useful.

Subscription.heading: Don't miss the next training sessions.
Subscription.description: Sign up to stay informed about new Koda 95 training sessions.
Subscription.name: Full name
Subscription.consent: I agree to the general terms of business and privacy policy.
Subscription.success: You're subscribed! We'll let you know about new sessions.
Subscription.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

TerminRegistrationForm.consentMarketing: I'd like to receive Koda 95 updates by phone and email.
TerminRegistrationForm.consentTerms: I agree to the general terms of business and privacy policy.

Confirmation.title: Your registration is confirmed!
Confirmation.subtitle: We've emailed you instructions for filling out the form.

Obrazec.headerTitle: Fill out the form before your training
Obrazec.headerDescription: We need your personal details for the training to run smoothly. It takes less than 2 minutes to fill in.
Obrazec.confirmedDescription: One more step — arrange payment to confirm your registration.
Obrazec.accountingNotice: Our accounting team will send the invoice to your company. No payment is required from you.
Obrazec.qrOnlineOnly: The QR code only works with personal online banking. Payment isn't possible at the post office, a bank branch, petrol stations, or other places that accept bill payments.

redna.name: Periodic Training – Koda 95
redna.heroDescription: Are you a professional driver holding category C or D? Periodic training to renew Koda 95 (CPC) is legally required every 5 years. At Tahografi Cuderman we run training sessions all year round. Pick a session that works for you and register using the form.
redna.metaTitle: Periodic Koda 95 Training — Register | Tahografi Cuderman
redna.metaDescription: Periodic training to renew Koda 95 (CPC) for professional drivers holding category C or D. Choose a session and register.

zacetna.name: Initial Qualification – Koda 95
zacetna.heroDescription: Are you a new professional driver holding category C or D? Initial Koda 95 qualification is legally required to obtain your driver's Certificate of Professional Competence (CPC). At Tahografi Cuderman we run training sessions all year round. Pick a session that works for you and register using the form.
zacetna.metaTitle: Initial Koda 95 Qualification — Register | Tahografi Cuderman
zacetna.metaDescription: Initial training to obtain the driver's Certificate of Professional Competence (CPC) for professional drivers holding category C or D. Choose a session and register.

quickRegistration.subject: Registration confirmed — {code}
quickRegistration.heading: Registration confirmed
quickRegistration.body: Your registration for {terminTitle} ({date}) has been successfully received.
quickRegistration.completeCta: You're successfully registered and we'll be expecting you at the training. Fill out the remaining details (personal information, payment method) today so everything's ready and check-in is quick on the day.
quickRegistration.footer: You're receiving this email because a registration for the training was submitted with your email address. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

completion.subject: Payment details — {code}
completion.heading: Registration completed
completion.body: You have successfully completed your registration for {terminTitle} ({date}).
completion.noPriceText: The price for this session hasn't been set yet. We'll notify you by email about the payment method.
completion.companyPaymentText: Payment of {amount} will be made by the company{companyLabel} via invoice.
completion.footer: If you have any questions, reply to this email.
